title: Copier supports update propagation to instantiated projects
content: Copier's `copier update` re-applies template changes to an already-instantiated project, reconciling local edits via a three-way merge. Snapshot template engines (Cookiecutter, bare GitHub template repos) provide no upstream path once a project is generated.
summary: Copier propagates later template changes to instantiated projects; snapshot engines do not.

verification.verdict_basis: Disconfirming search for a Copier update path that fails to propagate returned no credible counterevidence.
